title: OCGN Analyst Ratings and Stock Recommendations on Benzinga
text: Benzinga analyst ratings for Ocugen Inc. showing Buy consensus. Latest analyst ratings: 6 analysts all with Buy or Strong Buy recommendations. No sell ratings. Most recent rating upgrade: March 25, 2026 Chardan Capital $7.00 target. H.C. Wainwright maintains Buy rating with $12.00 target. Analyst commentary highlights: Strong clinical pipeline with near-term data catalysts. Three-BLA strategy ambitious but achievable. Gene therapy market transformative for blindness treatment. Concerns raised: Significant dilution from convertible offerings. Going concern language in filings. Cash burn rate requirements for clinical expansion. Valuation challenges given losses.
